description: Three Go test failures identified: (1) cmd/fernwood/main_test.go: expected 'Personal AI Assistant' but got 'Agentic Coding Harness', (2) pkg/config/model_config_test.go: invalid JSON with missing quote before api_key, (3) pkg/tools/filesystem_test.go: nil pointer dereference using uninitialized ReadFileTool.fs
resolution: Fix: update test expectation, correct JSON syntax, use NewReadFileTool to initialize tool
